languages.text: "Это отделение Музеона обречено... нет смысла тратить время на его спасение — самые ценные экспонаты уже были извлечены".
"This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."
languages.original_text: "Это отделение Музеона обречено... нет смысла тратить время на его спасение — самые ценные экспонаты уже были извлечены".

traits.locale_text: "This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."
"This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."
"This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."

languages.text: “陈列馆这片区域已在劫难逃……费心营救也不过是徒劳——最珍贵的展品早已悉数运离。”
languages.original_text: "This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."

traits.locale_text: “陈列馆这片区域已在劫难逃……费心营救也不过是徒劳——最珍贵的展品早已悉数运离。”

languages.text: «Esta sección del Museion está condenada... No merece la pena perder el tiempo intentando salvarla; las exposiciones más valiosas ya se han retirado».
languages.original_text: "This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."

traits.locale_text: «Esta sección del Museion está condenada... No merece la pena perder el tiempo intentando salvarla; las exposiciones más valiosas ya se han retirado».

languages.text: « Cette partie du Muséion est condamnée... Nous perdrions notre temps à tenter de la sauver ; les pièces les plus précieuses ont déjà été retirées. »
languages.original_text: "This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."

traits.locale_text: « Cette partie du Muséion est condamnée... Nous perdrions notre temps à tenter de la sauver ; les pièces les plus précieuses ont déjà été retirées. »

languages.text: "Diese Abteilung des Museions ist verloren ... Es hat keinen Sinn, Zeit für seine Rettung zu vergeuden ... die wertvollsten Exponate wurden bereits entfernt."
languages.original_text: "This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Abteilung des Museions ist verloren ... Es hat keinen Sinn, Zeit für seine Rettung zu vergeuden ... die wertvollsten Exponate wurden bereits entfernt."

languages.text: "Museion'un bu bölümü mahvoldu... Onu kurtarmaya çalışarak vakit kaybetmenin anlamı yok. En değerli eserler çoktan çıkarıldı."
languages.original_text: "This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."

traits.locale_text: "Museion'un bu bölümü mahvoldu... Onu kurtarmaya çalışarak vakit kaybetmenin anlamı yok. En değerli eserler çoktan çıkarıldı."

languages.text: 「このムゼイオンのこの部分は、もう救いようがない...救うために時間を無駄にするのは意味がない。最も価値のある展示品はすでに運び出されている。」
languages.original_text: "This section of the Museion is doomed... There is no point wasting time trying to save it — the most valuable exhibits have already been removed."

traits.locale_text: 「このムゼイオンのこの部分は、もう救いようがない...救うために時間を無駄にするのは意味がない。最も価値のある展示品はすでに運び出されている。」
